title: AI-assisted coding round practice
focus: Practice the new AI-pair-programming round style.

items.label: Pick a medium-hard problem you haven't seen
Solve with AI assistance (Cursor / Copilot / chat); narrate your decisions
Reflect: where did you over-trust the AI? Where did you correctly override?

interviewQuestions: When did the AI suggestion match what you'd have written?
Where did you override it and why?
How would you describe your AI workflow to an interviewer in 60 seconds?
